  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  - Add rc script (rename WRKSRC to avoid name conflict)

  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/129812

  Approved by:    Alex Samorukov <samm at os2.kiev.ua> (maintainer)
